top_signals.title: Goldman Sells $2.5 Billion Preferreds Following Spread Low
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. priced new preferred shares Monday, just days after a metric determining risk and value in these securities hit its lowest level since the global financial crisis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Boeing CEO says company still needs 'a couple more years' to repair finances before new jet
top_signals.summary: CEO Kelly Ortberg signalled Boeing is focused more on stabilizing its existing business than rushing to develop a successor to its bestselling 737 MAX.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump imposing 50% tariffs on certain Canadian goods over alleged trade discrimination
top_signals.summary: Canada's relationship with the U.S. has frayed amid Trump's tariff-heavy agenda and vocal displeasure with the nations' trilateral trade pact with Mexico.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
